title: Marketplace Manager - Shadowfax Asia Pacific Associates - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Shadowfax Asia Pacific Associates - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Join the Shadowfax Asia Pacific Associates family as a Marketplace Manager in Meerut. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Shadowfax Asia Pacific Associates:
Shadowfax Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shadowfax Asia Pacific Associates!
